required_preferences.fact: Now prepares grab-and-go snacks for her car every weekend — relies on portable options for Milwaukee drives and family visits due to less predictable weekends

supersedes.fact: Meal preps healthy snacks for the week each Sunday afternoon — will never rely on vending machines

required_preferences.fact: Attends and leads firm-sponsored regulatory and compliance training sessions for cross-border transactions, regardless of whether they relate to international tax law, as part of her new task force co-lead role

supersedes.fact: Only attends firm-sponsored upskilling sessions related to international tax law — skips general legal webinars

required_preferences.fact: Completes a five-minute guided meditation each night before bed, regardless of workload or stress
Adds a daily log entry tracking her energy, dizziness, and meals in a health app — proactively notes iron-rich foods consumed and supplement schedule for future discussions with her doctor.
Brings her work laptop and mobile hotspot during family caregiving weekends to remain available for urgent deal tasks
Seeks out expatriate and international lawyer networking events outside work hours to build a London-based professional and social circle

persona: A junior corporate lawyer at a multinational firm specializing in mergers and acquisitions
